name: Megan Dirks
bio: Brand coach and creator of The Girl on the Left who collaborates with women to share raw, transformative stories about growth, self-trust, and empowerment.

quote.paragraph: I had a lot of self-assurance from an early age because I had to dig so much. I know I can make shit happen now because I've proven it 20 million times in this process. Let's hunt around. Let's figure out a thing. Okay, let's do that thing. Every time just built more confidence in my decision making and self-trust.

name: Mary Bouras
bio: Confidence and etiquette coach, military spouse, and mother of twins who helps others cultivate poise, presence, and authentic self-belief.
quote: Confidence and etiquette coach, military spouse, and mother of twins who helps others cultivate poise, presence, and authentic self-belief.
